appContext.name: BabyRelay: Shared Baby Care
appContext.description: A shared baby care timeline for families and caregivers: sleep, feeds, diapers, notes, handoffs, invites, and multiple children.

style.fontStyle: warm editorial nursery, Fraunces-like serif headlines, readable rounded sans body
style.styleDescription: Premium App Store screenshot set for an iPhone baby-care app. Cream/dawn background, clay/coral CTAs, sage accents, dark cocoa text, subtle moon/star/sun/care-symbol details. Product screenshot remains the hero inside an iPhone frame. Avoid generic gradients, crowded badges, fake UI, medical claims, dark heavy palettes, or childish clutter.

screenshots.headline: Shared baby care, instantly calm
screenshots.subtitle: Parents, partners, grandparents, and nannies on the same page.

enhancement.contextualNote: The raw screen already contains the central product promise and transparent illustration.
enhancement.enhancementPrompt: Preserve all in-phone UI exactly. Frame the phone in a warm editorial nursery App Store layout with soft cream space, clay accent details, and tiny crescent/star care motifs outside the device only.

screenshots.headline: Know what’s next
screenshots.subtitle: Sleep windows, feeds, diapers, and notes in one calm timeline.

enhancement.focusArea: the Next Up card and one-tap care actions
enhancement.contextualNote: The screen already shows a clear next nap window and quick logs.
enhancement.enhancementPrompt: Preserve the in-phone UI exactly. Use generous whitespace and subtle nursery motifs outside the phone to highlight the prediction card without inventing extra UI.

screenshots.headline: One family, every child
screenshots.subtitle: Switch siblings without mixing care histories.

enhancement.focusArea: the child switcher sheet with Mae and Theo
enhancement.contextualNote: The raw screen demonstrates multiple children in one care team.
enhancement.enhancementPrompt: Preserve the child switcher sheet exactly and keep the tab bar hidden beneath the modal. Use outside-device design accents only.

screenshots.headline: Send calmer handoffs
screenshots.subtitle: Share the day before the next caregiver arrives.

enhancement.focusArea: the handoff summary card and share button
enhancement.contextualNote: The screen shows the caregiver handoff text clearly.
enhancement.enhancementPrompt: Preserve all phone UI and text. Add only marketing framing outside the device.

screenshots.headline: Invite your care team
screenshots.subtitle: Share a code or link and keep care synced.

enhancement.focusArea: the caregiver invite QR and code
enhancement.contextualNote: The screen shows the real QR invite modal.
enhancement.enhancementPrompt: Preserve QR/code readability and do not distort it. Outside the device, use warm illustrated care symbols sparingly.

screenshots.headline: Care stays coordinated
screenshots.subtitle: See who is on the team and what everyone can access.

enhancement.focusArea: the care team roster and invite button
enhancement.contextualNote: The screen shows owner/caregiver roles and invite entry.
enhancement.enhancementPrompt: Preserve phone UI. Keep the marketing shell restrained and premium, no extra badges or false claims.
